title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems may already understand and be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that society is insufficiently addressing AI risks. He discusses rapid technological progress, job displacement, and the inadequacy of corporate self-regulation.
